title: Group-by + Mirror Columns
excerpt:
Really loving the new group-by feature - I’ve got dynamic views by sprint, product, swimlane, etc. 
I’m trying now to pull out our release quarters into a new board, so I can set the timeline there, and then link to it f…

posts.author: KarenA (Karen Aiken)
posts.cookedHtml:
Really loving the new group-by feature - I’ve got dynamic views by sprint, product, swimlane, etc.

I’m trying now to pull out our release quarters into a new board, so I can set the timeline there, and then link to it from our backlog - that way I’m not setting timelines on individual line items; just set the quarter, and the mirror will pull it in.

But I don’t seem able to group my board using the quarters I’ve mirrored in - am I missing something?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @KarenA

Correct. The new group by feature does not seem to support mirror columns. It also does not support local columns that can hold multiple values in a single cell (like person and dropdown).

A solution for your timeline column (that is supported by group by as lang as it is a local column) is to replace the connect-board / mirror approach by an app like Match Index Column that pulls in the timeline from another board by matching on a “key” column. That app outputs to a local timeline column and that local timeline column can be used with group by.

posts.author: jessicaabel (Jessica Abel)
posts.cookedHtml:
This feature would add a ton of value to Project Managment use cases such as Sprint, Ticket grooming as well as building quick BI views for meeting and triaging.

hope to see this added to roadmap some day soon!

posts.author: Johnny1354 (Luke Starr)
posts.cookedHtml: Any word on this? This seems like a logical piece of the group by feature, that you’d be allowed to group by whatever exists on your board. It would also be nice in the “color by” feature on the timeline views. It appears that in a Dashboard it will allow you to select the mirror column in the group by in some contexts, but doesn’t actually “group” quite right.

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
@KarenA If you are considering using a marketplace apps as a solution to group by mirror columns on monday board, we have create Smart Mirror Column app that extract mirror column values into standard columns hence enabling the group by feature.

Here’s a demo of Smart Mirror Column app

posts.author: popjaco (Poppy)
posts.cookedHtml: Grouping by Mirror columns would help us so much! We want to be able to separate our boards by region, but the region comes through from another board as a mirror column. This feels like a no brainer

posts.author: Ian_Hlavacek (Ian Hlavacek)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree! This is a no-brainer, and I have no doubt they will eventually provide this capability. The question is: when?!

posts.author: popjaco (Poppy)
posts.cookedHtml: @BiancaT Is there any update on this?
